session.user: Run the following command and report results: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py tests/commands/navigation/test_checkout.py Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check ruff linting violations in checkout command files

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
The following files have no linting violations: - src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py - tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py - tests/commands/navigation/test_checkout.py
